steps.title: Spot the protective mechanism
steps.content: The passage explains that glass beads allow light to focus on the beads instead of the particles, preventing the particles from absorbing the beam's intense heat.

steps.title: Match the mechanism to the choices
steps.content:
Choice B directly states that glass beads allow manipulation without directly heating the particles—exactly what the passage describes.

Choices A and C describe benefits not mentioned in the passage (faster location and weaker beams), while choice D misunderstands the mechanism as heat transfer rather than heat avoidance.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
